evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implement data quality tests and participate in ensuring the accuracy and reliability of data pipelines
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Data quality tests, accuracy, coding best practices, and documentation dominate the responsibilities with no velocity or shipping-speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk: This work will directly inform and influence multiple division's strategies
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Errors affect strategic business and product decisions across divisions without explicit financial-reporting or regulatory consequence.
evidence.collaboration_width: analysts; business users; product and software stakeholders
evidence.data_team_maturity: Data and Analytics Center of Excellence
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named Center of Excellence with senior team members to learn from and established data science/ML practice signals a mature, specialised organisation.
evidence.jd_authorship: development of logical and physical data models, data wrangling and design / building of semantic layer
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical scope (logical/physical data models, semantic layer) and named tools (Snowflake, dbt, GitHub) give hiring-manager-level detail.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: help scope analytical requests from business, product, and software stakeholders
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Business, product, and software stakeholders are named with roughly equal weight, but the semantic layer work centres on internal data consumers.
evidence.autonomy_level: Follow and contribute to analytical engineering standards and best practices under the guidance of senior team members
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Explicit 'under the guidance of senior team members' and 'assist in' framing throughout place this firmly in execution.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or AI-consuming infrastructure anywhere in the posting.
evidence.testing_framing: Implement data quality tests and participate in ensuring the accuracy and reliability of data pipelines
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality tests are framed as an owned implementation responsibility, not just a listed tool.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Implement data quality tests and participate in ensuring the accuracy and reliability of data pipelines
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: reliability and accuracy of pipelines are emphasized as ongoing operational concerns without compliance or regulatory framing.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: working with raw data sets that leads to development of logical and physical data models
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of building new semantic layer/data models from raw data and following established analytical engineering standards.
evidence.language_gate: Submit your application, by uploading your CV in English
